texto: If there's one lesson I can pass along to people in situations like mine, it's that the best way to see a program through -- and it took me a long time to learn this -- is simply to accept the help, cooperate, and let others do what they think is worthwhile. In the meantime, continue racing to the finish line.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Joe Sutter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “If there's one lesson I can pass along to people in situations like mine, it's that the best way …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, business, there pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: If there's one lesson I can pass along to people in situations like mine, it's that the best way to see a program through -- and it took me a long time to learn this -- is simply to accept the help, cooperate, and let others do what they think is worthwhile. In the meantime, continue racing to the finish line.
